## Additional resources

- [CanadaLogin Power BI dashboard](https://app.powerbi.com/links/9IJ2hMLQ_C?ctid=9ed55846-8a81-4246-acd8-b1a01abfc0d1&pbi_source=linkShare) - the live metrics dashboard (accessible only on your ESDC laptop).
- [CanadaLogin Metrics Cookbook](https://cds-snc.github.io/canadalogin-metrics-cookbook/) - how each metric is defined and calculated, and what data is available.
- [Signal Check report archive](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/16UPl-Hiu-Ba8Xzmt8rni56s0CYUPiI7d?usp=sharing) - past editions of this report.
